initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_buy_potential,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_total,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales_total,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS store_returns_total,
    SUM(wr_return_amt) AS web_returns_total,
    SUM(cr_return_amt) AS catalog_returns_total
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = web_sales.ws_hdemo_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = store_returns.sr_hdemo_sk
LEFT JOIN web_returns ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_returns.wr_returned_date_sk AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = web_returns.wr_hdemo_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_returns ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = catalog_returns.cr_refunded_hdemo_sk
GROUP BY hd_buy_potential
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_buy_potential,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cs_bill_hdemo_sk IS NOT NULL THEN cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_sales_total
FROM 
    household_demographics
LEFT JOIN 
    store_sales ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    store_returns ON sr_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    web_sales ON ws_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    web_returns ON wr_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    catalog_returns ON cr_refunded_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    date_dim ON (ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk OR ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk OR cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk OR sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk OR wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk OR cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk)
GROUP BY 
    hd_buy_potential
ORDER BY 
    hd_buy_potential
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    hd.hd_buy_potential,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_total,
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales_total,
    SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS store_returns_total,
    SUM(wr.wr_return_amt) AS web_returns_total,
    SUM(cr.cr_return_amt) AS catalog_returns_total
FROM 
    store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON ss.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = sr.sr_returned_date_sk AND ss.ss_hdemo_sk = sr.sr_hdemo_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = ws.ws_sold_date_sk AND ss.ss_hdemo_sk = ws.ws_hdemo_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_returns wr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = wr.wr_returned_date_sk AND ws.ws_hdemo_sk = wr.wr_hdemo_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = cs.cs_sold_date_sk AND ss.ss_hdemo_sk = cs.cs_bill_hdemo_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_returns cr ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = cr.cr_returned_date_sk AND cs.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = cr.cr_refunded_hdemo_sk
GROUP BY 
    hd.hd_buy_potential
LIMIT 100
